title: GoatPack
description: Improve your performance, animations and graphics with Goatpack 🐐
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ff4531c61e6a1069cb7518ab914da30ae5910f3.png)



## Modpack Features
| | | |---------|----------------------------------------------------| | ⚡ | Optimization for smooth gameplay | | 🗺️ | Fabric support | | 🏕️ | Shaders integration for beautiful graphics | | ⚙️ | Fresh animations for an immersive experience | | 🧠 | Memory optimization for lower-end PCs | | 🎮 | FPS boost for better performance | | 🌍 | Faster world loading for seamless exploration | | 📡 | Low latency for smooth multiplayer gameplay | | 💾 | Reduced resource usage while maintaining visuals | | 🌀 | Smooth animations even on high-latency servers | | 🖥️ | Dynamic rendering to maintain stable FPS | | 🌐 | Server compatibility across multiple versions | | 🔧 | User-friendly customization of performance settings|
